name: RopeSpinning
notes:
Alternative finishing positions:
Man and Lady end to side
Man and Lady end diagonally fwd in Open CPP
Man: 1/8 to R on step 8 arresting lady's turn with L hand.
Lady: 7/8 to R over steps 1-8.
Lady end fwd toward Man's R side
Man: turns body slightly R on step 8 to lead Lady towards his R side. Man: LF slightly leftwards on step 7.
Lady: LF fwd in line with RF into fwd lock.
Man and lady fwd towards partner's R side
Man: RF fwd in line with LF on step 8, into fwd lock towards Lady's R side. Man may turn up to 1/4 to R over steps 7-10.
Lady: turn up to 1/4 more accordingly.

steps.action: Move left foot to side and continue turning body to the right
comments: If preferred, Man can keep his R hand lightly in contact with Lady
Circle L hand clockwise over head over step 1 and 2

steps.action: Transfer weight to right foot and turn body slightly left, returning to normal position
comments: Return body to normal position over 2 and 3

steps.action: Compact Chasse LRL ending in LSP, continue turning body to left
comments: Gradually lower to waist level over steps 3-5

steps.action: Move right foot back, no turn, continue circling left hand
comments: Continue to circle L hand clockwise over steps 6-9
Incline body slightly to L on step 6

steps.action: Two walks forward RL, then forward lock RLR, circling R behind Man's back
comments: Alternative finishing positions as described above
